mapper.sql: tpch.parent_id, tpch.change_type, tpch.change_plan_date, tpch.change_describe, tpch.oa_order, tpch.id, tpch.create_time, tpch.create_by, tpch.update_time, tpch.update_by, tpch.pass_flag

${tAlias}.parent_id as ${tAlias}_parent_id, ${tAlias}.change_type as ${tAlias}_change_type, ${tAlias}.change_plan_date as ${tAlias}_change_plan_date, ${tAlias}.change_describe as ${tAlias}_change_describe, ${tAlias}.oa_order as ${tAlias}_oa_order, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.pass_flag as ${tAlias}_pass_flag
mapper.insert: insert into td_plan_change_history (parent_id, change_type, change_plan_date, change_describe, oa_order, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, pass_flag) values (#{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{changeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{changePlanDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{changeDescribe,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{passFlag, jdbcType = BIT})
mapper.update: update td_plan_change_history set parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, change_type = #{changeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, change_plan_date = #{changePlanDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, change_describe = #{changeDescribe,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, oa_order = #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, pass_flag = #{passFlag, jdbcType= BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
